alzheimer-mouse.success_rule: At least one pathway entry overlaps with the truth file.

comparative-genomics.success_rule: At least one consensus_annotation string exactly matches the truth output.

cystic-fibrosis.success_rule: The final CSV must contain the exact expected causal CFTR variant with all required fields.

deseq.success_rule: At least five gene_id values overlap with the truth DESeq output.

evolution.success_rule: At least one variant has matching chromosome and position in the truth set.

metagenomics.success_rule: The most abundant phylum must be Pseudomonadota and at least two additional OTUs must agree in phylum with the truth data.

single-cell.success_rule: At least one cluster_id and predicted_cell_type pair must overlap with the truth CSV.

transcript-quant.success_rule: The transcript_id to count mapping must exactly match the truth TSV.

viral-metagenomics.success_rule: The species Bottlenose dolphin adenovirus 1 must be reported in the Viruses domain.
